orbit: 5-cam orbit auto-placed around source-PLY weighted centroid; radius=1.2*||IQR(positions)||; height=centroid_y + 0.3*radius
render_determinism_psnr: 100 dB across all cams (src vs src) — gsplat render is deterministic at this configuration

bonsai_iter7000.decoded_ply: bonsai_iter7000_decoded.ply (273.7 MB, 1,157,141 splats — splat count + bbox preserved)
bonsai_iter7000.note: 3 of 5 cams (cam0, cam1, cam2) point at empty regions of the scene (src_mean < 1e-4 = essentially black). PSNR(black,black) = 100 dB inflates the raw mean. On the 2 cams that actually capture scene content, decoded rendering is visibly different from source: source mean luminance 0.33/0.53, decoded 0.20/0.45 — codec systematically dims & alters the SH-DC term. Per-cam PSNR on content cams is 13.9 dB and 19.4 dB, far worse than the 35 dB lossless-perceptual floor (drop = 21.1 dB and 15.6 dB respectively). Gate NOT met.

bicycle_iter7000.decoded_ply: bicycle_decoded.ply (855 MB, 3,616,103 splats — splat count + bbox preserved)
bicycle_iter7000.note: 4 of 5 cams capture scene content. Cam1 hits a near-empty sky region (src_mean = 0.006) so reports a high 43 dB. The 4 content cams all show severe drops (15-25 dB), with worst-case cam3 at 9.7 dB — visibly destroyed. Gate NOT met.

verdict.summary: MesonGS++ mgs-balanced FAILS the ≤0.3 dB render-PSNR gate on both bonsai and bicycle.
verdict.recommendation: Do NOT promote mgs-balanced as a recommended preset. The 23-24x compression ratio comes at a substantial fidelity cost (~15-20 dB PSNR drop on content-bearing cams). The smoke test in bonsai_iter7000_smoke.json (bbox + splat count preserved to <1e-5) is a necessary but not sufficient check — the K-means quantization of SH/scale/opacity groups is causing visible artefacts. Recommended actions: (1) relabel TryIt picker entry as 'MesonGS++ — preview, large PSNR drop' or hide pending fix; (2) investigate which feature group (likely f_dc / opacity / scale) contributes most drift; (3) re-run with mgs-preserve-order and a K=512 sweep to find the quality knob.
